title: hyptis rotundifolia
intro: Hyptis rotundifolia, also known as False Lion's Tail, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hyptis rotundifolia include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies to treat skin conditions and wounds.
